rationale: The evidence matrix is now clear enough to write an honest manuscript skeleton and identify missing experiments.
Continuing handcrafted image-only symbol/text repair gave diminishing returns; dedicated training would be a larger new engineering branch.
A paper skeleton will expose exactly which baselines, ablations, and annotation gaps must be filled before SCI2 submission.

model_quality_first.recommended_when: GPU/training time is available and goal is stronger final metrics before writing.
model_quality_first.risk: Longer open-ended engineering cycle; may delay manuscript framing.

manuscript_packaging_first.recommended_when: Need to clarify publishable story, target venue, missing evidence, and experiment table now.
manuscript_packaging_first.expected_benefit: Fast clarity on SCI2 gap and a structured submission roadmap.
manuscript_packaging_first.risk: Still cannot submit until missing experiments are completed.

selected_next_task.goal: Create an honest manuscript skeleton with claims, evidence, missing experiments, figures/tables, and target-journal positioning.

parallel_backlog: Train/evaluate dedicated symbol detector branch for image-only v15 or full public-raster coverage.
Add OCR/text branch for raster text targets.
Validate contains relation on true model-output raster predictions.
Human-review real-scene pilot annotations before any real drawing metric claim.
